## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] Overlay permission flow tested, if relevant
- [ ] Notification listener flow tested, if relevant

## Public Repo Safety

- [ ] No secrets, keystores, generated APKs/AABs, or local paths are committed
- [ ] Screenshots and logs do not contain private notification content
- [ ] Documentation was updated, if needed
